rationale: The citing paper studies online vs. offline channel effects on vice purchasing via symbolic/physical product presentation, vividness, and instant-gratification mechanisms, while the cited paper is a dynamic Bayesian model of tariff choice, learning, and switching costs in a home-delivery service. With only a single DOI match and no in-text context provided, this looks like a domain-level background citation (online grocery setting) rather than a likely substantive method/theory input for the focal mechanism.
